summary: Ukrainian forces are conducting sustained drone operations targeting Russian logistics and rear-area infrastructure, with the 1st "Azov" Corps maintaining pressure on routes around Donetsk and the SBS "Hungarian Birds" striking multiple high-value targets in Crimea, including Iskander missile bases and oil depots. Russian operators from the "Rubicon" Center report destroying over 100 Ukrainian targets daily, including fixed-wing UAVs, in the Donbas, Sumy, and Belgorod directions. On the tactical level, FPV drones are being used for direct engagements, such as neutralizing Russian assault teams on motorcycles and ambushing a soldier who attempted to feign surrender. Ukrainian forces are also employing electronic warfare to interfere with enemy drones and using drone detectors to anticipate and survive FPV attacks, as seen in the Kostiantynivka sector with the 36th Marine Brigade.
